title: Afterlife: Entombed
description: Forgotten gods rise again to reclaim their lost empire.
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eecc86e152b118e42a330508c7093c8dca8f542.png)
A mod centered on Egyptian mythology: explore vast desert tombs, encounter ancient gods, and battle cursed mummies. Featuring mystical relics, forgotten rituals, and dark secrets, this mod blends survival, mystery, and myth in a journey through the afterlife.
